core_beliefs.belief: 上帝的荣耀与灵魂的救赎
core_beliefs.source: The end of all and the ultimate aim of all, should be none other than God's honor and the salvation of one's soul
To this end, the practice of music, both vocal and instrumental, is by all means to be praised
core_beliefs.explanation: 巴赫对音乐与宗教关系的认识

core_beliefs.source: Bach enriched established German styles through his mastery of counterpoint
core_beliefs.explanation: 巴赫作为对位法大师的成就

core_beliefs.source: Bach family had produced three to four generations of musicians
core_beliefs.explanation: 巴赫家族 3-4 代音乐家传承

core_beliefs.source: a busy captain, of whom certainly his posterity will scarcely know how to think fittingly

Bach enriched established German styles through his mastery of counterpoint, harmonic and motivic organisation, and his adaptation of rhythms, forms, and textures from abroad, particularly Italy and France
core_beliefs.explanation: 巴赫综合德国+意大利+法国传统

core_beliefs.belief: C. P. E. Bach 继任者承继音乐之家
core_beliefs.explanation: 巴赫 4 作曲家儿子继续音乐事业

core_beliefs.belief: 死亡意识——临终对死亡的接受
core_beliefs.source: 他临终要求简单木棺和小墓标
core_beliefs.explanation: 巴赫对死亡的简单态度

key_themes: 上帝的荣耀与灵魂的救赎
C. P. E. Bach 等儿子承继
